title: Correlative Conventional and Super-resolution Photoactivated Localization Microscopy Imaging in Live Cells
author: Dushyant Mehra

steps.instruction: After publishing the protocol ( https://bio-protocol.org/e4850 ), we noticed that the last name of the corresponding author was misspelled. It should be Puchner , not Pucher.
